rules.title: No routine antibiotics framework
rules.message: No routine antibiotics for viral URI, simple diarrhea, allergic rhinitis, dry eye, or likely viral conjunctivitis unless a verified indication is documented.

rules.title: Antibiotic indication/duration/source required
rules.message: Antibiotic selection requires disease-specific indication, dose, duration, and source.

rules.title: Systemic antibiotics may be needed; urgent ophthalmology/ER pathway.
rules.condition: scleral/intraocular extension OR systemic infection OR gonococcal keratitis
rules.message: Systemic antibiotics may be needed; urgent ophthalmology/ER pathway.
rules.action_message: Systemic antibiotics may be needed; urgent ophthalmology/ER pathway.

rules.title: Avoid clarithromycin-containing H. pylori regimen unless susceptibility confirmed or no alternative and specialist decis
rules.message: Avoid clarithromycin-containing H. pylori regimen unless susceptibility confirmed or no alternative and specialist decision.
rules.action_message: Avoid clarithromycin-containing H. pylori regimen unless susceptibility confirmed or no alternative and specialist decision.

rules.title: Avoid levofloxacin-containing H. pylori regimen unless susceptibility confirmed and other preferred regimens unavailable
rules.message: Avoid levofloxacin-containing H. pylori regimen unless susceptibility confirmed and other preferred regimens unavailable/used.
rules.action_message: Avoid levofloxacin-containing H. pylori regimen unless susceptibility confirmed and other preferred regimens unavailable/used.

rules.title: Do not use topical/oral antibiotic for noninfected AD.
rules.condition: no pus, honey crust, oozing, cellulitis, or bacterial infection sign
rules.message: Do not use topical/oral antibiotic for noninfected AD.
rules.action_message: Do not use topical/oral antibiotic for noninfected AD.

rules.title: Do not use antibiotic; use eczema anti-inflammatory + emollient plan instead.
rules.message: Do not use antibiotic; use eczema anti-inflammatory + emollient plan instead.
rules.action_message: Do not use antibiotic; use eczema anti-inflammatory + emollient plan instead.

rules.title: Allow antibiotic row; otherwise route to viral URI/common cold supportive care.
rules.condition: only if severe >3–4 days, persistent >10 days, or worsening after initial improvement
rules.message: Allow antibiotic row; otherwise route to viral URI/common cold supportive care.
rules.action_message: Allow antibiotic row; otherwise route to viral URI/common cold supportive care.

rules.title: Do not prescribe antibiotic for negative RADT in adults.
rules.message: Do not prescribe antibiotic for negative RADT in adults.
rules.action_message: Do not prescribe antibiotic for negative RADT in adults.

rules.title: Do not use empiric antibiotics routinely.
rules.condition: acute watery diarrhea without recent international travel
rules.message: Do not use empiric antibiotics routinely.
rules.action_message: Do not use empiric antibiotics routinely.

rules.title: Treat confirmed GAS pharyngitis with antibiotic.
rules.condition: positive RADT or throat culture required
rules.message: Treat confirmed GAS pharyngitis with antibiotic.
rules.action_message: Treat confirmed GAS pharyngitis with antibiotic.

rules.title: Consider no antibiotic/back-up antibiotic with safety-net; avoid broad antibiotics.
rules.condition: mild lower UTI symptoms and low risk
rules.message: Consider no antibiotic/back-up antibiotic with safety-net; avoid broad antibiotics.
rules.action_message: Consider no antibiotic/back-up antibiotic with safety-net; avoid broad antibiotics.

rules.title: Do not auto-select prophylaxis antibiotic without susceptibility and prior antibiotic review.
rules.message: Do not auto-select prophylaxis antibiotic without susceptibility and prior antibiotic review.
rules.action_message: Do not auto-select prophylaxis antibiotic without susceptibility and prior antibiotic review.

rules.title: Antibiotics only if purulent sputum or severe/high-risk features; otherwise avoid routine antibiotic.
rules.message: Antibiotics only if purulent sputum or severe/high-risk features; otherwise avoid routine antibiotic.
rules.action_message: Antibiotics only if purulent sputum or severe/high-risk features; otherwise avoid routine antibiotic.

rules.title: Prefer hydrogen peroxide 1% if available; use topical antibiotic only if unsuitable/ineffective.
rules.message: Prefer hydrogen peroxide 1% if available; use topical antibiotic only if unsuitable/ineffective.
rules.action_message: Prefer hydrogen peroxide 1% if available; use topical antibiotic only if unsuitable/ineffective.

rules.title: Do not routinely offer topical or oral antibiotic; treat eczema flare first.
rules.message: Do not routinely offer topical or oral antibiotic; treat eczema flare first.
rules.action_message: Do not routinely offer topical or oral antibiotic; treat eczema flare first.

rules.title: Use oral antibiotic/cellulitis pathway; do not use topical-only.
rules.message: Use oral antibiotic/cellulitis pathway; do not use topical-only.
rules.action_message: Use oral antibiotic/cellulitis pathway; do not use topical-only.

rules.title: Do not routinely prescribe antimicrobials remotely unless severity can be assessed, alternative diagnosis risk is low, a
rules.message: Do not routinely prescribe antimicrobials remotely unless severity can be assessed, alternative diagnosis risk is low, antimicrobial need is clear, and follow-up safety advice is given.
rules.action_message: Do not routinely prescribe antimicrobials remotely unless severity can be assessed, alternative diagnosis risk is low, antimicrobial need is clear, and follow-up safety advice is given.

rules.title: Consider immediate/back-up antibiotic; prefer narrow-spectrum penicillin if appropriate.
rules.message: Consider immediate/back-up antibiotic; prefer narrow-spectrum penicillin if appropriate.
rules.action_message: Consider immediate/back-up antibiotic; prefer narrow-spectrum penicillin if appropriate.

rules.title: Use no antibiotic or delayed antibiotic strategy when safe.
rules.message: Use no antibiotic or delayed antibiotic strategy when safe.
rules.action_message: Use no antibiotic or delayed antibiotic strategy when safe.

rules.title: Antibiotic only by invasive diarrhea/cholera/protozoal criteria; consider stool test/culture.
rules.condition: bloody/mucus stool, high fever, stool WBC/RBC
rules.message: Antibiotic only by invasive diarrhea/cholera/protozoal criteria; consider stool test/culture.
rules.action_message: Antibiotic only by invasive diarrhea/cholera/protozoal criteria; consider stool test/culture.

rules.title: Use macrolide only when atypical features or non-response support it.
rules.message: Use macrolide only when atypical features or non-response support it.
rules.action_message: Use macrolide only when atypical features or non-response support it.
